topics: History of Computer Networks and the Internet

Media, Signal strength and interference. Data encoding, Multiplexing (TDM, FDM). Data Link layer Design Issues
Flow Control and ARQ techniques. Data link Protocols
HDLC. IEEE 802 FOR LANs IEEE 802.3, 802.5. Wireless LANs
Network Layer Protocols - Virtual circuits and datagrams
and VPNs Routing algorithms - Link-state and distance vector routing
Routing on the internet RIP OSPF and BGP
Principles of Reliable data transfer - end-to - end flow control mechanisms
Connectionless transport UDP. Application layer protocols - HTTP and HTTPs
and Peer-to-peer file sharing networks Suggestion on Project Topics Project
